questions.question: What happens when white light passes through a prism as shown?
questions.explanation: A prism disperses white light into its component wavelengths.

questions.question: The bending of light when it moves from air into water is called:
questions.explanation: Refraction is the change in direction caused by light entering a medium with a different refractive index.

questions.question: Which color of visible light has the longest wavelength?
questions.explanation: Red light has the longest wavelength in the visible spectrum.
